retrieval_friction.label: Retrieval Friction
retrieval_friction.description: Key supporting evidence may be slow to locate when verification is needed.

version_drift.label: Version Drift Risk
version_drift.description: Different teams may be relying on different versions of the same underlying information.

definition_conflict.label: Definition Conflict
definition_conflict.description: Teams may not be using the same definition for important numbers or metrics.

dominant_failure_mode.label: Dominant Failure Mode
dominant_failure_mode.description: Under pressure, the same weak point may repeatedly become the system’s main source of failure.
